# Decision Log Template

ID: DEC-YYYYMMDD-01
Date:
Title / Short summary:
Context:
- Background and why this decision matters

Options considered:
- Option A: pros / cons
- Option B: pros / cons

Decision:
- Chosen option and short explanation

Owners / Stakeholders:
- Name(s)

Consequences / Follow-ups:
- Changes required (code/docs/process)
- Related issue/PR links:

Notes / Revision history:
- YYYY-MM-DD — created by @

How to store: Add a file in docs/decision-log/ with the ID as the filename and link the decision from related PRs and issues.
